title: 'Can check if phenomena correct': Trump calls UFO review ‘very interesting documents'
description: President Trump revealed that a government review of UFO-related material has unearthed "interesting" documents, with initial releases imminent. This follows his February directive for agencies to declassify files amid public fascination. While previous Pentagon reports found no evidence of extraterrestrial visitation, Trump's administration is now making these findings accessible.

title: Trump teases upcoming release of UFO documents at Turning Point USA event
description: President Trump on Friday teased at a Turning Point USA event in Phoenix that he will direct Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth to release government files on UFOs and unexplained aerial phenomena (UAPs). "I recently directed the Secretary of War ... to begin releasing government files relating to UFOs and unexplained aerial phenomena," Trump said. "And...

title: Trump says review of UFO files found ‘interesting' documents
description: The image from video provided by the Department of Defense labelled Gimbal, from 2015, an unexplained object is seen at center as it is tracked as it soars high along the clouds, traveling against the wind. “There’s a whole fleet of them,” one naval aviator tells another, though only one indistinct object is shown. “It’s rotating.” The U.S. government has been taking a hard look at unidentified flying objects, under orders from Congress, and a report summarizing what officials know is expected to come out in June 2021.

title: Trump says top secret government UFO files sealed for years will finally be REVEALED 'very, very soon'... and they contain 'very interesting' findings
description: Donald Trump revealed the news at a speaking event with Turning Point USA in Arizona on Friday.

title: Trump says UFO review uncovered 'interesting' documents
description: President Donald Trump said on Friday that his administration’s review of UFO-related material uncovered a number of “interesting” documents, adding that an initial tranche of records is expected to be released soon.
